description: Fragment from the beginning a letter in Judaeo-Arabic, in lovely and distinctive handwriting. The writer has been forced to stay in a funduq due to an illness, and there is no one there to help him. At one point he visited the house of al-Kohen al-Ṣiqillī, presumably a physician, to take a medicine. Most of the rest of the letter is lost. He mentions Umm Muslim and in the margin reiterates that he has been living in the funduq. ASE.
tags: illness letter 969-1517, illness: funduq, Illness: physician, Illness, funduq, Illness: treatment
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
